summary: Frontend review of PR #48 (FR-PERS-001 Save Model) is complete. Verdict: APPROVED. All 4 acceptance criteria satisfied, all 4 test IDs (T-FE-PERS-001-01 through T-FE-PERS-001-04) present and correctly structured. Implementation covers ActionBar.tsx, Notification.tsx, and persistenceService.ts. 5 minor non-blocking observations noted in PR review comment. No blocking issues. Ready for human gate-6b-feature-pr.
